choices.text: Magnetic course determines altitude (above 3,000 ft AGL): 0-179° → odd thousands + 500 (3,500/5,500); 180-359° → even thousands + 500 (4,500/6,500). Prevents head-on collisions.

ADS-B Out: automatically broadcasts GPS position to ATC + other aircraft. Required since 2020 in most controlled airspace. 100× more accurate than radar. ADS-B In receives weather + traffic data on EFBs like ForeFlight.

questions.explanation: ADS-B Out for automatic position reporting.
